document.source_title: IPL 2026: SRH qualify for playoffs after beating CSK by 5 wickets

claims.claim_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad qualified for the IPL 2026 playoffs.
claims.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad booked their place in the IPL 2026 playoffs after beating Chennai Super Kings by five wickets.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Hyderabad, India.
entities.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad booked their place in the IPL 2026 playoffs.

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Chennai, India.
entities.evidence_text: Chennai Super Kings by five wickets.

entities.name: Ishan Kishan
entities.description: Indian cricketer who played for Sunrisers Hyderabad.
entities.evidence_text: Kishan led the chase with a classy 70 off 47 balls.

entities.name: Heinrich Klaasen
entities.description: South African cricketer who played for Sunrisers Hyderabad.
entities.evidence_text: Klaasen added a quick 47 from just 26 deliveries.

entities.name: Pat Cummins
entities.description: Australian cricketer and captain of Sunrisers Hyderabad.
entities.evidence_text: SRH skipper Pat Cummins produced another impressive spell with the ball.

events.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad booked their place in the IPL 2026 playoffs after beating Chennai Super Kings by five wickets at Chepauk.

metrics.name: SRH Points
metrics.evidence_text: The victory took SRH to 16 points and confirmed their playoff spot.

metrics.name: CSK Points
metrics.evidence_text: CSK, meanwhile, remain on 12 points from 13 matches.
